form.formComment: Well-beaten 18 days ago at this track over 1790m, before that was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr6) over 2190m at this track, beaten 25 m by Good Boots Bindi (2:40.90) in NR 57 to 66 on March 10 at $101. Needs to lift substantially.

form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Last start 11th (Sr4) over 1720m at Melton, well beaten by Tara Victory (2:01.10) in 0W/15 0K stake on March 28 at $51. At the previous start 5th (Sr5) over 2100m at Charlton, beaten 24 m by Fire Marshall (2:29.40) in NR 56 to 64 on March 15 at $9. Worth another chance. Leading player.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 1.5 m second behind Ideal Bandit at Swan Hill over 1750m NR 56 to 64 last start. Before that was beaten a neck second at this track over 1790m same class on March 20. Racing well and is a strong chance.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fourth behind Prioritise at this track over 1790m in a NR 65 or better on March 20 at $61. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third after showing early speed, behind Dallas Miki at this track over 2190m in a NR 57 to 64 on March 27 at $19. Capable of a strong showing.

form.formComment: Comes here second-up after two months. Lacklustre first-up performance when surrendered the lead and finished 8th (Fr2) over 2190m after showing early speed at this track well beaten by Santa Casa Beach (2:39.30) in NR 67 or better on February 4 at $51. Looks outclassed.

form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Last start 7th (Sr2) over 1790m after being wide early at this track was 2nd-1.4 at the bell, beaten 18 m by Prioritise (2:09.50) in NR 65 or better on March 20 at $6. The run previous 7th (Sr1) over 2190m at this track was 7th-21.4 at the bell, beaten 14 m by Santa Casa Beach (2:40.70) in NR 67 or better on March 10 at $13. Expecting a spike in form this time.
